summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reset the opening to begin with Doug's Wednesday-morning arrival at the Lincoln Theatre so the chapter enters from a distinct action rather than another static room description, and clarified the closing choice-point by naming Friday explicitly to hand off more cleanly into the next chapter.
edits: Rewrote the opening sentence to start with Doug parking on East Long Street Wednesday morning, improving transition from the prior chapter and differentiating the chapter's entry construction from the adjacent visible opening.
Added 'on Friday' to Doug's final reflection so the exit points more directly into the next chapter's pre-show green-room scene.
Checked style-bible calibration example lines against the chapter and found no verbatim matches, so no replacement edits were needed.
